message:
fix(test): remove t.Parallel() from graph tests that capture os.Stdout

The 6 tests using captureGraphOutput race on the global os.Stdout
when run in parallel, causing one test to capture another's output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
